title: Daemon.Stats result
description: v0.5.7 base shape + v0.6 v2 fields (capability `daemon_stats_v2`). Pre-mount Stats omits the v2 fields entirely; post-mount Stats carries the pinned workspace context.

calls.description: Map of method-name -> call count for this daemon process. Per protocol-v0 the keys are bounded to the closed method enum.

cancellations.description: v0.6+, capability `cancellable_queries`. `total` = cumulative successful cancels (stale cancels not counted); `in_flight` = point-in-time gauge of registered cancellable requests.

pinned_workspace_path.description: v0.6+ (capability `daemon_stats_v2`). Present only when a workspace is mounted.

workspace_id.description: v0.6+ (capability `daemon_stats_v2`). 16-char hex blake3 fingerprint. Present only when a workspace is mounted.

index_generation.description: v0.6+ (capability `daemon_stats_v2`). Bumps on every committed write.

cold_walk_completed_at_ms.description: v0.6+ (capability `daemon_stats_v2`). Unix-epoch ms when the writer's ColdWalkComplete flush committed, or null if cold walk hasn't finished.

rehydrate_attempts_total.description: v0.6+. Cumulative count of Workspace.Mount calls (resets on daemon restart).

rehydrate_successes_total.description: v0.6+. Cumulative count of mounts that took the Rehydrate fast path.

rehydrate_invalidations_by_reason.description: v0.6+. Per-reason tally of why a rehydrate was rejected ('crash', 'EmptyOrMissingFingerprint', etc.).
